short.en: Adapter that bridges Gardena quick-connect to G3/4 male threads when the OEM piece breaks.
short.sl: Adapter, ki poveže Gardena hitri spoj z G3/4 navojem, ko se originalni del zlomi.

description.en: Printed in PETG with three perimeters and 60 % infill, then sealed with PTFE tape on the threaded end. Survives garden-tap pressure (~3 bar) without weeping after a season outdoors.
description.sl: Natisnjen iz PETG-a s tremi obrisi in 60 % polnilom, navojni del zatesnjen s PTFE trakom. Prenese tlak vrtne pipe (~3 bar) brez puščanja po sezoni na prostem.
